content: One paper titled 'Adaptive Expert Learning for Hyperspectral and Multispectral Image Fusion' was accepted to IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing (IEEE TGRS)!
One paper titled 'A New Context-Aware Framework for Defending Against Adversarial Attacks in Hyperspectral Image Classification' was accepted to Remote Sensing!
Won the 2026 China Scholarship Council (CSC) scholarship for joint doctoral training!
Won the second prize (Top 3 worldwide) in the 1st Anti-Tampering and Copyright Protection Challenge for AIGC at AAAI 2026!
Started PhD study at Shenzhen University, College of Computer Science and Software Engineering.
